captions.p3_hybrid:
A close-up of a dark bowl filled with steaming rice soup, featuring bean sprouts, yellow mung bean sprouts, sliced green onions, and a rich brown broth, with a spoon partially submerged. The scene conveys a fresh, appetizing casual meal.  
Search keywords: rice soup, bean sprouts, mung bean sprouts, green onions, broth, spoon, bowl, meal, casual dining
captions.p3_hybrid_food_guard:
Caption: A close-up of a bowl filled with bean sprouts, white rice grains, and sliced green onions floating in a brown broth, with a metal spoon partially lifting ingredients from the soup.  

Visual details: The image shows bean sprouts (with yellow tips), white rice grains, sliced green onions, and red chili flakes in a glossy brown broth. A black bowl contains the meal, with a metal spoon partially submerged. Visible elements include thin white sprouts, yellow-tipped bean sprouts, and scattered small red and green pieces (likely chili and scallion bits). The broth has oil droplets and a rich, warm appearance.  

Context cues: Captured in spring 2018, likely during a lunchtime meal in a Korean setting, taken with an iPhone SE.  

Search keywords: bean sprouts, rice, green onions, soup, broth, chili flakes, Korean meal, spring food, metal spoon, black bowl, close-up food, Korean cuisine

captions.p3_hybrid:
A bowl of udon noodles in a light broth is topped with a soft-boiled egg, a slice of cooked beef, and fresh green vegetable pieces.  

Search keywords: udon noodles, soft-boiled egg, beef, green vegetable, broth bowl, comfort meal
captions.p3_hybrid_food_guard:
Caption: A top-down view of a bowl containing white noodles, a soft-boiled egg, sliced meat, and green vegetable pieces in light broth.  

Visual details: A metal bowl holds a pale broth with thin, flexible white noodles. Visible ingredients include a smooth, white soft-boiled egg, a brownish slice of cooked meat with textured edges, and pale green leafy vegetable pieces. The noodles are submerged in the broth, with all items clustered centrally. The composition is a close-up shot emphasizing the food's textures and arrangement. No text is visible.  

Context cues: Taken in November 2016 during autumn, captured with an Apple iPhone SE. Location context suggests a meal in South Korea.  

Search keywords: soup, noodles, soft-boiled egg, sliced meat, green vegetables, light broth, Korean meal, home-cooked soup, comfort food
